description: Bottom part of a list in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (1100–38 CE). On parchment. Mentioning part of the formulaic blessings for Maṣliaḥ Gaʾon (1127–39 CE), תכון משרתו לנצח. At least part of it concerns an expenditure given to Abū l-Ḥasan to be delivered to the widow of Abū l-Munā mentioning dirhams and dinars. The entries are separated by horizontal lines. Many other names are mentioned. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
